title: System and method for additive manufacturing
abstract: The invention concerns a system (1) for additive manufacturing, comprising a support (10), a dispenser (110,111, 112) configured to provide an additive material (3, 33, 34) on the support (10) and/or close to a component (2) supported by said support (10). The system (1) also comprises a head controller (13) configured to control a relative movement (122) between an head (12) and the support (10) for selectively providing an energy (121) for joining additive material (3) and/or a binding agent for dunking additive material so as to permit a solidification by curing. The system further comprises a detecting device (14) mechanically fixed to the head (12) and configured to provide a given material property by sensing a target portion (31) of the additive material, and/or a target portion (22) of the joined and/or dunked additive material.
claims:
Claims Claims 1. A system (1) for additive manufacturing of a component, comprising: a support (101, 102); a head (12) configured to selectively provide energy (120) or/and a first functional agent, notably a binding agent (123), when operating, for solidifying additive material (3, 33, 34) on or above said support (10); a head controller (13) configured to control a relative movement (122) between the head (12) and the support (10) for selectively providing the energy (121) or/and the first functional agent, notably the binding agent (123), with respect to the support (10); the system further comprising a detecting device (14) configured to provide a given material property when operating by: sensing a target portion (31, 32) of the additive material (3, 33, 34); and/or by sensing a target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material wherein the detecting device (14) and said head (12) are configured to operate simultaneously at least during some parts of the additive manufacturing of the component. 2. The system according to claim 1, wherein the detecting device (14) is configured to operate while said head (12) is operating. 3. The system according to claim 1 or 2, wherein the detecting device (14) is fixed to the head (12) so as to impart a common movement to said detecting device (14) and said head (12) over a build area. 4. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein the detecting device (14) is arranged to sense the target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material while said head (12) is selectively providing energy (120) or/and the first functional agent to solidify the target portion 

 (31, 32) of the additive material (3, 33, 34) located ahead of the target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material with reference to the movement of said head (12). 5. The system according to any of claims 1 to 3, wherein the detecting device (14) is arranged to sense a target portion (31, 32) of the additive material (3, 33, 34) so as to detect unsolidified material while said head (12) is selectively providing energy (120) or/and the first functional agent to solidify the target portion (31, 32) of the additive material (3, 33, 34) located behind the target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material with reference to the movement of said head (12). 6. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein the detection device (14) is configured to sense substantially simultaneously the target portion (31, 32) of the additive material (3, 33, 34) and the target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material while said head (12) is selectively providing energy (120) or/and the first functional agent to solidify the target portion (31, 32) of the additive material (3, 33, 34) 7. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein the detecting device (14) is configured to provide a first material property by sensing said target portion (31, 32) of the additive material. 8. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein the detecting device (14) is configured to provide a second material property by sensing a target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material. 9. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein the head (12) comprises a dispenser (110,111, 112) configured to provide an additive material (3, 33, 34) on or above the support (10), and/or 

 the first functional agent, notably the binding agent (123), provided by the head (12) is combined with the additive material; said target portion (32) of the additive material being a portion of additive material leaving and/or passing through said head. 10. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein said energy (121) and/or the first functional agent (123) is provided within a solidification area (125), and wherein said target portion (31) of the additive material and/or said target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material is within and/or close to said solidification area (125). 11. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein the detecting device (14) is configured to sense additive material and/or solidified additive material and/or the first functional agent and/or a second functional agent and/or a contrast agent located within a sensing volume (146) being spatially correlated with a position of the head (12); preferably the sensing volume (146) being spatially correlated with a position of said solidification area (125). 12. The system according to claim 11, wherein the first and/or second functional agent (123) is provided with said contrast agent being sensed by the detecting device (14). 13. The system according to any of the preceding claim, wherein the detecting device (14) is configured to simultaneously sense said target portion (31) of the additive material and said target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material; preferably said sensing volume (146) encompassing or being close to the solidification area (125). 14. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein said additive material is a powder material (33). 15. The system according to claim 14, said given material property and/or said first material property is: a density, a maximal size of particles, a minimal size of particles, a mean size of particles, a particle distribution, or a purity of said target portion (31, 32) of said powder material and/or of said first functional agent and/or said second functional agent. 16. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein said given material property and/or said second material property is: a porosity, a density, a distribution, an integrity, or a homogeneity of said target portion (22) of the solidified additive material. 17. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein said given material property and/or said second material property is: a density, a distribution, or a homogeneity of the first and/or second functional agent within the solidified additive material. 18. The system according to any preceding claim, wherein the detecting device (14) comprises: an eddy current sensing unit (143) comprising at least an eddy current sensor (1430, 1431); and/or a capacitive sensing unit (144) comprising at least a capacitive sensor (1440, 1441); and/or an emitting-receiving unit (145) comprising at least an electromagnetic emitter (1451) and at least an electromagnetic receiver (1450, 1452); and/or an optical sensing unit comprising at least an illumination source and at least an optical sensing element sensitive to visible light and/or to infrared radiation and/or to ultraviolet radiation. 19. The system according to claim 18, wherein the detecting device (14) comprises a combination of two of more of: said eddy current sensing unit (143), said capacitive sensing unit (144), said emitting-receiving unit (145) and said optical sensing unit. 20. The system according to claim 19, wherein said at least an eddy current sensor (1430, 1431), said at least a capacitive sensor (1440, 1441), and/or said at least an electromagnetic emitter (1451) and said at least an electromagnetic receiver (1450, 1452) are spatially arranged in an array (140, 140', 141, 141 '). 21. The system according to any preceding claim, further comprising a manufacturing supervisor (15) configured to detect a manufacturing anomaly and/or an abnormal intermediate status of the solidified additive material based on said given material property and/or first material property and/or second material property. 22. The system according to claim 21, wherein the manufacturing supervisor (15) is configured to detect said manufacturing anomaly and/or said abnormal intermediate status based on: a comparison of said given material property and/or first material property and/or second material property with a given reference material property; and/or a difference between said given material property and/or first material property and/or second material property from a given expected material property; and/or a deviation of said given material property and/or first 

 material property and/or second material property from a given material property range. 23. The system according to claim 21 or 22, wherein the manufacturing anomaly is a delamination and/or a crack. 24. The system according to any one of claims 21 to 23, wherein the manufacturing supervisor (15) is also configured to detect a plurality of intermediate status of the solidified additive material; preferably said plurality of status comprises: loose base additive material, wet powder material, green state, brown state, sintered additive material. 25. The system according to any one of claims 21 to 24, wherein the manufacturing supervisor is configured, in response of a detection of a manufacturing anomaly and/or an abnormal intermediate status of the solidified additive material, to control the dispenser (110, 111) and/or the head (12) and/or the head controller (13) so as to trigger a manufacturing action on a given portion of the additive material and/or on a given portion of the component (3). 26. The system according to claim 25, wherein the manufacturing action is an interruption of the additive manufacturing of the component; or a modification of a parameter of the dispenser so as to modify a property of the provided additive material and/or of additive material to be provided; and/or a modification of a parameter of the head so as to modify a property of the delivered energy (121) and/or of the first additive material (123). 27. A method for an additive manufacturing of a component (1) by repetitively superposing and solidifying material layers, according to a 3D model of the component, comprising the steps of: providing a support (10); by means of a head (12) being moveable with respect to the support (10), selectively providing an energy (120) or/and a functional agent, notably a binding agent (123), for solidifying additive material (3, 33, 34) on or above said support (10); wherein, the method further comprises, by means of a detecting device (14) fixed to the head, a step of providing a given material property by sensing a target portion (31, 32) of said additive material; and/or by sensing a target portion (22, 23) of the solidified additive material when said head (12) is solidifying additive material (2, 33, 34). 28. The method according to claim 27, further comprising a step of: providing the detecting device (14) with a combination of: an eddy current sensing unit (143), a capacitive sensing unit (144), an emitting- receiving unit (145), and/or an optical sensing unit. 29. The method according to claim 27 or 28, further comprising a step of: adding a contrast agent being sensed by the detecting device (14) to the functional agent, notably to the binding agent (123).
